summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive refs are scoped to route_security. Closed refs were not given closure actions. Several open PRs need maintainer/technical judgment because merge, fix, and raise_pr are blocked in this job.
